title: AthleteGuardian
description: Pivot binding an Athlete to a legally responsible User. Carries tenant_id (CASCADE) + athlete_id (CASCADE — guardian rows have no meaning without their athlete) + user_id (RESTRICT — the guardian's User cannot be soft-deleted while they hold an active guardianship). Cascades organization + region + branch through athlete → branch, application through tenant. NEVER carries application_id, organization_id, region_id, branch_id, or scope_node_id. Exactly one is_primary=true per (tenant_id, athlete_id) tuple when any active guardian exists. verification_status transitions: pending → verified (auto-household OR HR manual OR silent-acceptance) → optionally disputed → resolved or revoked (terminal).

athlete_id.description: CASCADE: guardian rows have no meaning without their athlete. When an athlete is hard-deleted (post-7-year retention), guardian rows go with it.

user_id.description: The guardian's User. RESTRICT — the User cannot be soft-deleted while they hold an active guardianship. Guardian handoff (transfer to another User) must complete first.

relationship.description: Enum: mother / father / step_mother / step_father / grandmother / grandfather / aunt / uncle / sibling / legal_guardian / foster_parent / other. The 'other' bucket covers legal-guardian-as-a-legal-status when the relationship word doesn't fit (e.g. an appointed court-ordered guardian who is neither a relative nor a foster parent).

is_primary.description: Exactly one is_primary=true per (tenant, athlete) when any guardian exists. Enforced by partial unique index. Auto-elected to the earliest-added remaining guardian on primary removal.

has_legal_custody.description: Legal decision-making authority for the athlete. Required to record consents on medical + third-party disclosures for minors.

can_pickup.description: Authorised to collect the athlete from sessions. Reception staff check this on session dismissal. Default true because most guardians can pick up; explicit false is set for absent guardians.

can_receive_communications.description: Receives session / enrollment notifications. Default true. False is rare — usually set when a divorced parent's spouse is on the roster but not the day-to-day contact.

can_authorise_medical_care.description: Emergency medical decisions. Default false. Set true only for guardians with has_legal_custody=true — the observer refuses can_authorise_medical_care=true without has_legal_custody=true.

verification_status.description: Enum: pending / verified / disputed / revoked. Guardians in verified state may record consents for the athlete. Disputed guardians BLOCK from consent-recording (the athlete-consent rule refuses). Revoked is terminal.

verification_method.description: Enum: auto_household / hr_manual / silent_acceptance / self_declared. How the current verification was reached. Auto-populated by the observer on transition to verified.

verified_by_user_id.description: The User who performed the verification (typically HR for manual verify; null for auto_household / silent_acceptance).

verification_document_file_id.description: Reference to a storage::File (Wave 4+) with the signed proof document. Only set when verification_method='hr_manual' AND athlete_guardian_verification entitlement is on.

dispute_reason.description: Free-text reason when verification_status='disputed'. HR-visible only.

revoke_reason.description: Free-text reason when verification_status='revoked'. HR-visible only. Retained 7 years.

indexes.name: athlete_guardians_athlete_user_unique
indexes.description: One live row per (athlete, guardian_user). Prevents duplicate guardian records.

indexes.name: athlete_guardians_primary_unique
indexes.predicate: is_primary = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: The load-bearing invariant: exactly one primary guardian per athlete when any exists. Enforced at the DB layer.

indexes.name: athlete_guardians_user_idx
indexes.description: Feeds the /me/guardianships surface (list every athlete this User guardians).

is_active.description: Computed. verification_status IN ('verified', 'pending', 'disputed') AND deleted_at IS NULL.

x-invariants: One live row per (tenant_id, athlete_id, user_id) — enforced by partial unique index
athlete_id is IMMUTABLE post-create — a guardian belongs to one athlete for their lifetime
user_id is IMMUTABLE post-create — a guardianship row is a link to a specific user
tenant_id is IMMUTABLE post-create — enforced by defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling
One is_primary=true per (tenant_id, athlete_id) when any active guardian exists — enforced by partial unique index
When is_primary=true, verification_status MUST be 'verified' (primary guardian MUST be verified before they can act as primary — enforced by observer)
can_authorise_medical_care=true requires has_legal_custody=true (enforced by observer + valid_guardian_role_flags rule)
verification_status='revoked' is terminal — cannot transition back to verified (must add a new guardian row)
verification_status='disputed' BLOCKS the row from acting as consent recorder for athlete consents (cross-module rule)
Small tier (athlete_multi_guardian entitlement off): at most 1 guardian per athlete (enforced by observer counting live rows)
Medium tier (athlete_multi_guardian on): at most 4 guardians per athlete
Enterprise tier: unlimited guardians per athlete
verification_document_file_id required when verification_method='hr_manual' AND athlete_guardian_verification entitlement is on
The athlete's tenant_id MUST equal the guardian.tenant_id (defense-in-depth)
The user's tenant_id MUST equal the guardian.tenant_id (cross-tenant FK smuggling guard)
